name: Stickman Sniper Shoot
description: Step into the world of intense long-range combat in Stickman Sniper Shoot, an action-packed sniper shooting game where precision, patience, and fast reflexes are the keys to survival. Become an elite stickman sniper assassin and take on dangerous missions filled with enemies, secret operations, and high-risk targets. Every shot matters, and one mistake can mean mission failure.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
